skipped_smoke_tests.name: Settings UI — Providers Section (API Key Management)
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch the app, navigate to Settings → Providers. Click "Add API Key". Select "OpenAI" from provider dropdown. Enter a test API key. Click "Test Key" — verify green checkmark and "API key validated successfully" message appears. Click "Save" — verify key appears in the list with masked display (e.g., "sk-...abc123"). Click the copy button — verify key is copied to clipboard (paste into Notepad to confirm). Click "Delete" and confirm dialog. Verify key is removed from list.

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Settings UI — Profiles Section (Model Configurations & Personas)
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch the app, navigate to Settings → Profiles. Verify "Model Configurations" and "Personas" sections are visible. Click "New Model Configuration". Set display name to "GPT-4o Test". Select a provider. Verify model dropdown populates from auto-fetch. Set temperature slider to 0.7. Select SlidingWindow for context overflow. Click Save — verify it appears in the list. Click "Duplicate" — verify a copy appears with "(Copy)" suffix. Click "New Persona". Set name to "Test Persona", enter system prompt "You are a test assistant. Today is {{date}}.", select the saved model config, choose Standard chat mode, save. Verify persona appears in list. Delete the persona and model config — verify both are removed.

skipped_smoke_tests.name: Persona Selection per Chat (B4)
skipped_smoke_tests.description: Launch the app. Navigate to Studio Chat. Verify the chat header shows the active persona name. Click the persona dropdown in the toolbar — verify all personas appear, with recently-used ones at top. Press Ctrl+N — verify the persona picker opens, showing all personas. Select a different persona — verify the chat header updates. Verify the persona dropdown reflects the change. Select a persona, close the app, reopen — verify the persona persists.
